revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24598347618|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Amawaketoyohime-jinja]][[ja:天別豊姫神社]] {{Expand Japanese|天別豊姫神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Amawake Toyohime Shrine | native_name = 天別豊姫神社 | image = Amawaketoyohime-jinja, haiden.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Amawake Toyohime Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.538907|133.384015}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Toyotama-hime|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotama-hime|de|Toyotama-hime|en|Toyotama-hime|es|Toyotama-hime|fa|تویوتاما-هیمه|fi|Otohime|fr|Otohime|id|Toyotama-hime|ja|トヨタマヒメ|ko|도요타마히메|mni|ꯇꯣꯌꯣꯇꯃ-ꯍꯤꯃꯦ|pl|Toyotama-hime|ru|Тоётама-химэ|simple|Toyotama-hime|sv|Otohime|uk|Тойотама-хіме|vi|Toyotama-hime|zh|豐玉毘賣命|qid=Q2329261|1=Toyotama-hime}} }} {{nihongo|'''Amawake Toyohime Shrine'''|天別豊姫神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bingo Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11387367|ltq=Q11387367|qid=Q11387367|1=List of Shikinaisha in Bingo Province}} ** Series ordinal: 2 ** P155: {{ill|Takeinatakisayafutsuno Shrine|lt=Takeinatakisayafutsuno Shrine|qid=Q135041240|1=Takeinatakisayafutsuno Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135041241|ltq=Q135041241|qid=Q135041241|1=Susanowonono Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Fukuyama, Hiroshima|lt=Fukuyama|ar|فوكوياما (هيروشيما)|arz|فوکویاما, هيروشيما|azb|فوکویاما، هیروشیما|az|Fukuyama|be|Фукуяма (горад)|bg|Фукуяма|ca|Fukuyama|ceb|Fukuyama (lungsod)|ce|Фукуяма (гӀала)|cs|Fukujama (Hirošima)|de|Fukuyama|el|Φουκουγιάμα|en|Fukuyama, Hiroshima|envoyage|Fukuyama|eo|Fukujama|es|Fukuyama (Hiroshima)|eu|Fukuyama (Hiroshima)|fa|فوکویاما، هیروشیما|fi|Fukuyama|fr|Fukuyama|ga|Fukuyama|gl|Fukuyama|he|פוקויאמה (עיר)|hy|Ֆուկույամա|id|Fukuyama, Hiroshima|it|Fukuyama|ja|福山市|kab|Fukuyama|kk|Фукуяма|ko|후쿠야마시|lt|Fukujama|ms|Fukuyama, Hiroshima|mzn|فوکویاما، هیروشیما|nl|Fukuyama (Hiroshima)|nov|Fukuyama, Hiroshima|no|Fukuyama (Hiroshima)|os|Фукуямæ (сахар)|pl|Fukuyama|plvoyage|Fukuyama|pt|Fukuyama (Hiroshima)|ro|Fukuyama|ru|Фукуяма (город)|sh|Fukujama|simple|Fukuyama, Hiroshima|sr|Фукујама|sv|Fukuyama, Hiroshima|szl|Fukuyama|tg|Фукуяма|th|ฟูกูยามะ|tl|Fukuyama, Hiroshima|tr|Fukuyama|tt|Фукуяма (шәһәр)|uk|Фукуяма|ur|فوکویاما، ہیروشیما|uz|Fukuyama|vi|Fukuyama|war|Fukuyama, Hiroshima|zh_classical|福山市|zh_min_nan|Hukuyama-chhī|zh_yue|福山|zh|福山市|qid=Q661038|1=Fukuyama, Hiroshima}} * {{ill|Bingo Province|lt=Bingo Province|az|Binqo vilayəti|cs|Provincie Bingo|de|Provinz Bingo|en|Bingo Province|es|Provincia de Bingo|fa|ولایت بینگو|fr|Province de Bingo|gl|Provincia de Bingo|id|Provinsi Bingo|it|Bingo (provincia)|ja|備後国|ko|빈고국|lt|Bingo žemė|nl|Bingo (provincie)|pt|Província de Bingo|ru|Бинго (провинция)|simple|Bingo Province|sk|Bingo (provincia)|sr|Провинција Бинго|tr|Bingo (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Бінґо|zh_min_nan|Bingo-kok|zh|備後國|qid=Q1049113|1=Bingo Province}} * {{ill|Yasuna district|lt=Yasuna district|ja|安那郡|zh|安那郡|qid=Q10947253|1=Yasuna district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.538907|133.384015}} == image (P18) == * Amawaketoyohime-jinja, haiden.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q2329261|ltq=Q2329261|qid=Q2329261|1=Toyotama-hime}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183104 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q90139226|ltq=Q90139226|qid=Q90139226|1=Ken-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11071125|ltq=Q11071125|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == country (P17) == * ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * あまわけとよひめじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 5240005007441 == Commons category (P373) == * Amawaketoyohime-jinja == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '広島県福山市神辺町川北142-2', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Amawaketoyohime-jinja}} [[JA:天別豊姫神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11442354}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name = Amawake Toyohime Shrine |Image = [[File:Amawaketoyohime-jinja, haiden.jpg|280px]]
Worship hall |Location = {{ill|lt=Hiroshima Prefecture|Q617375|qid=Q617375|1=Hiroshima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Fukuyama City|Q661038|qid=Q661038|1=Fukuyama, Hiroshima}} Kannabe-chō Kawakita 142-2 |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities = {{ill|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotama-hime|Q2329261|qid=Q2329261|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotama-hime no Mikoto|1=Toyotama-hime}}
{{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Hayasusanoo no Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}
{{ill|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|qid=Q8009611|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi no Kami|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor)
Former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Prefectural shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} |Founded = Unknown |Main hall = Three-bay shrine, {{ill|lt=Kirizuma-zukuri|Q13308575|qid=Q13308575|1=Kirizuma-style}} |Alternate name = |Pilgrimage sites = |Annual festival = |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Hiroshima|label=Amawake Toyohime
Shrine|position=left|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} [[File:Amawaketoyohime-jinja, torii.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Amawake Toyohime Shrine''' (あまわけとよひめじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Kannabe-chō Kawakita, {{ill|lt=Fukuyama City|Q661038|qid=Q661038|1=Fukuyama, Hiroshima}}, {{ill|lt=Hiroshima Prefecture|Q617375|qid=Q617375|1=Hiroshima Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}, and under the {{ill|lt=modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|lt=former shrine ranking|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} it was classified as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=prefectural shrine|1=Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226}}. In ancient times it was also known as “Kannabe Daimyōjin” and “Kannobi Daimyōjin.” The shrine is situated on the mid-slope of Mt. Kōyō to the south of the townscape of Kannabe, and it is said that the place name “Kannabe” derives from this shrine. === Enshrined deities === Five deities are enshrined. ; Principal deities :* {{ill|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotama-hime|Q2329261|qid=Q2329261|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotama-hime no Mikoto|1=Toyotama-hime}} (とよたまひめのみこと) – regarded as the original enshrined deity. :* {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Hayasusanoo no Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} (はやすさのおのみこと) :* {{ill|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|qid=Q8009611|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi no Kami|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} (ことしろぬしのかみ) ; Associated deities :* {{ill|lt=Kibitsuhiko no Mikoto|Q65318|qid=Q65318|1=Kibitsuhiko-no-mikoto}} (きびつひこのみこと) :* {{ill|lt=Kagutsuchi|Q1640658|qid=Q1640658|lt=Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami|1=Kagu-tsuchi}} (ひのかぐつちのかみ) The two associated deities were enshrined together in Taishō 3 (1914), when Kibitsu Shrine in the Kake area of Kawakita Village was merged into this shrine. === History === === Overview === In ancient times, the area around the shrine is said to have been an inlet of the sea called “Anaumi.” According to shrine tradition, it was originally enshrined as Iso Shrine on a rocky shore in Amitsukidani, and later relocated further inland to Mount Konakayama“Place Names of Hiroshima Prefecture,” entry on Amawake Toyohime Shrine.. Within the same {{ill|lt=Bingo Province|Q1049113|qid=Q1049113|1=Bingo Province}}, there are {{ill|lt=Numakuma Shrine|Q11554446|qid=Q11554446|1=Nunakuma Shrine}} (in Tomo-chō, Fukuyama City), which enshrines Toyotama-hime’s father Toyotamahiko ({{ill|lt=Watatsumi|Q1474187|qid=Q1474187|lt=Ōwatatsumi no Mikoto|1=Watatsumi}}), and Sorahiko Shrine in {{ill|lt=Shōbara City|Q857234|qid=Q857234|1=Shōbara}}, which enshrines her husband Sorahiko ({{ill|lt=Hoori|Q1051960|qid=Q1051960|lt=Hikohohodemi no Mikoto|1=Hoori}}); this shrine lies between them. In the {{ill|lt=Rikkokushi|Q1151168|qid=Q1151168|lt=national histories|1=Rikkokushi}}, it is recorded that in Genkei 2 ({{ill|lt=878|Q23910|qid=Q23910|1=878}}) the shrine deity “Amawake Toyohime no Kami” was promoted in {{ill|lt=divine rank|Q11591025|qid=Q11591025|1=Shinkai (divine rank)}} from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade. In the Jinmyōchō of the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|qid=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}} compiled in Enchō 5 ({{ill|lt=927|Q30470|qid=Q30470|1=927}}), it is listed as “Amawake Toyohime Shrine” in {{ill|lt=Anna District|Q10947253|qid=Q10947253|1=Yasuna district}} of Bingo Province, and is classified as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}. During the Kenmu era ({{ill|lt=1334|Q6007|qid=Q6007|1=1334}}–{{ill|lt=1338|Q6044|qid=Q6044|1=1338}}), when Asayama Kagetsura built {{ill|lt=Kannabe Castle|Q11590904|qid=Q11590904|1=Kannabe Castle}} on Mt. Kōyō, the shrine was made the castle’s guardian deity and relocated to its present site on the mid-slope of Mt. Kōyō. In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|qid=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, it was venerated by the lords of the {{ill|lt=Bingo Fukuyama Domain|Q909278|qid=Q909278|lt=Fukuyama Domain|1=Fukuyama Domain}}, namely the {{ill|lt=Mizuno clan|Q2975321|qid=Q2975321|1=Mizuno clan}} and the {{ill|lt=Abe clan (Tokugawa fudai)|Q11657874|qid=Q11657874|lt=Abe clan|1=Abe clan}}. In Meiji 1 ({{ill|lt=1868|Q7717|qid=Q7717|1=1868}}), an investigation by the Fukuyama Domain identified it as a Shikinaisha, and in Meiji 2 ({{ill|lt=1869|Q7720|qid=Q7720|1=1869}}) its official name was set as “Amawake Toyohime Shrine.” In Meiji 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|qid=Q7757|1=1873}}) it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} under the {{ill|lt=modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}, and in Shōwa 15 ({{ill|lt=1940|Q18633|qid=Q18633|1=1940}}) it was elevated to a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=prefectural shrine|1=Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226}}. === Divine ranks === * Genkei 2 ({{ill|lt=878|Q23910|qid=Q23910|1=878}}), 11th month, 13th day: promotion from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade ({{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|qid=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}) – recorded as “Amawake Toyohime no Kami.” === Shrine grounds === [[File:Amawaketoyohime-jinja, honden.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Main hall}}]] The main hall was constructed in Meiji 11 ({{ill|lt=1878|Q7776|qid=Q7776|1=1878}}) and is a three-bay shrine in the {{ill|lt=kirizuma-zukuri|Q13308575|qid=Q13308575|1=Kirizuma-style}} style. === Auxiliary shrines === * Tenno Shrine * Inari Shrine * Kō Shrine * Benzaiten Shrine * Tenjin Shrine In addition, many other small shrines stand within the precincts. === Visitor information === '''Address''' * Kannabe-chō Kawakita 142-2, {{ill|lt=Fukuyama City|Q661038|qid=Q661038|1=Fukuyama, Hiroshima}}, {{ill|lt=Hiroshima Prefecture|Q617375|qid=Q617375|1=Hiroshima Prefecture}} '''Access''' * By rail: {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|qid=Q502125|lt=JR West|1=West Japan Railway Company}} {{ill|lt=Fukuen Line|Q899394|qid=Q899394|1=Fukuen Line}} / {{ill|lt=Ibara Railway|Q11373397|qid=Q11373397|1=Ibara Railway}} {{ill|lt=Ibara Line|Q11373399|qid=Q11373399|1=Ibara Line}} {{ill|lt=Kannabe Station|Q6363862|qid=Q6363862|1=Kannabe Station}} (about 7 minutes on foot) '''Nearby''' * Kannabe-juku – the 23rd {{ill|lt=post town|Q1209783|qid=Q1209783|1=Shukuba}} on the {{ill|lt=Saigoku Kaidō|Q10518413|qid=Q10518413|1=Seigoku kaidō}} (former {{ill|lt=San’yōdō|Q1376722|qid=Q1376722|1=San'yōdō}}). ** Kannabe Honjin – a Hiroshima Prefecture–designated cultural property and historic site. * {{ill|lt=Kannabe Castle|Q11590904|qid=Q11590904|1=Kannabe Castle}} * {{ill|lt=Renjuku|Q11486322|qid=Q11486322|1=Renjuku}} and former residence of {{ill|lt=Sugachazan|Q1723424|qid=Q1723424|1=Sazan Kan}} – a nationally designated {{ill|lt=Special Historic Site|Q26764449|qid=Q26764449|1=Special Historic Site}}. === Notes === {{Footnote help}} {{reflist}} === References === * “{{ill|lt=Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei|Q17213509|qid=Q17213509|1=Japanese Historical Topography Series}}: History of Hiroshima Prefecture” ({{ill|lt=Heibonsha|Q11482108|qid=Q11482108|1=Heibonsha}}), Fukayasu District, entry on Amawake Toyohime Shrine === External links === * {{Commonscat-inline|Amawaketoyohime-jinja}} {{Shinto portal}} Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Hiroshima Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Fukuyama, Hiroshima]] [[Category:福山市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Bingo Province]] 50+ untranslated japanese characters]]
